name: Tree Sidebar
details: An advanced sidebar with hierarchical project tree navigation and drag-and-drop support. Features nested projects with expand/collapse, drag-and-drop reordering (before/after/inside), item assignment via drag, and view-based navigation (All, Today, Upcoming, etc.).
instructions: Import: import { VIEWS, type CurrentView } from './constants/tree-sidebar-constants'
Add state: const [currentView, setCurrentView] = useState<CurrentView>({ type: VIEWS.ALL })
patterns: ProjectNode: { id, title, color?, parentId?, children? }
VIEWS: ALL, TODAY, UPCOMING, LOGBOOK, TRASH, PROJECT, USER
